def create_user(data):
    # Violation: duplicate validation pipeline repeated
    if not data.get("username"): raise ValueError("Missing username")
    if len(data["username"]) < 3: raise ValueError("Username too short")
    db.save_user(data)

def update_user(data):
    if not data.get("username"): raise ValueError("Missing username")
    if len(data["username"]) < 3: raise ValueError("Username too short")
    db.update_user(data)
